items.example: When Declan walked up on stage to get his prize, I was bursting with pride.
You've looked down in the dumps for a few days now — is there anything wrong?
Hearing I'd got the maximum score possible in my test made my day.
I was on cloud nine while we were winning, but not now that we're losing.
I'm really pumped about the concert that's coming up next week.
It was midnight and I was on my own, so I was scared stiff when someone knocked on the door.
We were all shaken up after seeing the news report about the accident.
I'm sick to death of listening to you complain all day every day.
